prompt_text:
### Demographics: 50-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Recurrent UTIs over the last 6 months with dysuria/frequency.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 75.1 kg; Height 160.7 cm; BMI 29.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 111/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.9%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 10.5%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.5%), FPG (12 months ago 258mg/dL; 9 months ago 242mg/dL; 6 months ago 288mg/dL; 3 months ago 252mg/dL; current 250mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 71.1kg; 9 months ago 73.1kg; 6 months ago 75.2kg; 3 months ago 74.2kg; current 75.1kg), Height (12 months ago 160.7cm; 9 months ago 160.7cm; 6 months ago 160.7cm; 3 months ago 160.7cm; current 160.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 29.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 111mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 76mmHg; 9 months ago 74mmHg; 6 months ago 73mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 9U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 14U/L), AST (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 7U/L; 6 months ago 7.0U/L; 3 months ago 7.0U/L; current 11U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 65mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 69mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 65mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 64mL/min/1.73m²; current 66mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 46mg/g; 9 months ago 48mg/g; 6 months ago 35mg/g; 3 months ago 44mg/g; current 43mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 34mg/dL; 3 months ago 34mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 187mg/dL; 9 months ago 168mg/dL; 6 months ago 168mg/dL; 3 months ago 166mg/dL; current 178mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.8g/dL; 6 months ago 15.0g/dL; 3 months ago 14.2g/dL; current 14.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
